message:
feat: Phase 2 tokenizer optimization + results table

**Implemented (3 agents):**
- Agent 1: 32-wide SIMD (comptime CPU detection)
- Agent 2: Cache prefetching (@prefetch)
- Agent 3: SIMD string comparison

**Benchmark Results (60s runs, 15K texts):**
- Training: 313ms
- Encoding: 1095μs/iter (49.7x slower than Rust)
- Throughput: 0.28 MB/s (49x slower)
- Memory: 2 KB (5.5x better than Rust)

**Next:** Fix encoding algorithm (real bottleneck)
